attributes.description: Alerts when `ExclusiveLock` or `AccessExclusiveLock` counts exceed 5. Exclusive locks block all other access.
attributes.name: [PostgreSQL OTel] Exclusive lock contention

investigation_guide.blob:
## PostgreSQL exclusive lock contention

### What fired
Count of exclusive locks exceeded 5 during the window.

### Why it matters
ExclusiveLock blocks most other lock modes; AccessExclusiveLock blocks everything. Accumulating exclusive locks usually means a DDL-like statement is running or stuck.

### Triage
1. Check for long-running DDL / maintenance.

### Remediation
- Finish or kill the long-running statement.

### Tuning
- 5 locks; tighten per environment.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Locks by mode; ExclusiveLock and AccessExclusiveLock indicate contention
| WHERE postgresql.database.locks IS NOT NULL
| WHERE attributes.mode IN ("ExclusiveLock", "AccessExclusiveLock")
| STATS lock_count = SUM(postgresql.database.locks) BY service.instance.id, attributes.mode
// Threshold: > 5 exclusive locks; adjust for your workload
| WHERE lock_count > 5
